name: Luna Open Demo WhatsApp Inbound Live Reply Pipe

meta.description: Stage 27demo-k live-reply pipe. STAGING/DEMO ONLY — INACTIVE in repo; import into staging n8n only. Never replace production Main. Meta WhatsApp webhook → normalize → guard phone_number_id 1152900101233109 → POST /staff/bot/open-demo-whatsapp-inbound-dry-run with send_live_reply_confirmed:true ONLY (no booking/Stripe/confirmation flags). Staff API owns live send gates. X-Luna-Bot-Token via Luna Bot Internal Token (staging). No graph.facebook.com. No api.stripe.com.

nodes.name: Code - Map Staff API Live Reply Response

parameters.jsCode:
// Stage 27demo-k — map Staff API open-demo live-reply response
const http = $input.first().json;
const normalized = $('Code - Normalize Meta WhatsApp Inbound').first().json;
const statusCode = http.statusCode || http.status || 0;
const api = http.body || http;

const proposed = api.review && api.review.proposed_luna_reply
  ? api.review.proposed_luna_reply
  : (api.proposed_luna_reply || null);

return [{
  json: {
    live_reply_pipe_mode: true,
    send_live_reply_confirmed: true,
    staff_api_status: statusCode,
    staff_api_success: api.success === true,
    sends_whatsapp: api.sends_whatsapp === true,
    whatsapp_sent: api.whatsapp_sent === true,
    live_send_blocked: api.live_send_blocked === true,
    send_performed: api.send_performed === true,
    guest_message_send_status: api.guest_message_send_status || null,
    whatsapp_message_id: api.whatsapp_message_id || null,
    provider_message_id: api.whatsapp_message_id || api.provider_message_id || null,
    live_send_gate_code: api.live_send_gate_code || api.demo_live_reply_gate_code || null,
    no_write_performed: api.no_write_performed === true,
    review_persistence_performed: api.review_persistence_performed === true,
    conversation_id: api.conversation_id || null,
    proposed_luna_reply: proposed,
    proposed_luna_reply_preview: proposed ? String(proposed).slice(0, 160) : null,
    demo_gate_blocked: api.demo_gate_blocked === true,
    demo_gate_code: api.demo_gate_code || null,
    guest_phone: normalized.guest_phone,
    wamid: normalized.wamid,
    phone_number_id: normalized.phone_number_id,
    message_text: normalized.message_text,
    staff_api_endpoint: '/staff/bot/open-demo-whatsapp-inbound-dry-run',
    note: 'Stage 27demo-k: n8n pipe only — Staff API brain; send_live_reply_confirmed only; no booking/Stripe/confirmation flags.'
  }
}];
